A space equals space open square brackets table row 1 cell negative 2 end cell row 6 0 end table close square brackets comma space B space equals space space open square brackets table row cell negative 1 end cell 0 row 6 7 end table close square brackets comma space C space equals space open square brackets table row 1 cell negative 2 end cell row 6 0 end table close square brackets comma space dan italic space straight D space equals space open square brackets table row 4 cell negative 2 end cell row cell negative 2 end cell 1 end table close square brackets
